narrative:
Cols 87-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 689 registered voters, with 72.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
